title: dombeya lucida var. humbertii
intro: Dombeya lucida var. humbertii, also known as a type of flowering tree, is a species of plant in the family Sterculiaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dombeya lucida var. humbertii include reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, as well as having potential antiviral and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
